metadata.name: Sensitivity Labels - Standard Set
metadata.description: Creates a standard set of sensitivity labels: Public, Internal, Confidential, and Highly Confidential. Confidential adds headers/footers, Highly Confidential adds encryption.

labels.tooltip: Information that is intended for public consumption.
labels.comment: No protection applied. Suitable for marketing materials, public announcements.

labels.tooltip: Information for internal use only. Not intended for external sharing.
labels.comment: Default label for general business content.
labels.footerText: Classification: Internal - For authorized use only

labels.tooltip: Sensitive business information. Sharing restricted to authorized personnel.
labels.comment: For HR data, financial reports, strategic documents.
labels.footerText: Classification: Confidential - Do not distribute externally

labels.tooltip: Extremely sensitive information. Encrypted and access-restricted.
labels.comment: For executive communications, M&A documents, legal privileged content.
labels.footerText: Classification: Highly Confidential - Encrypted and restricted
